Headline: Red Line Delays
ShortDescription: Red Line trains are running w/residual delays and congestion following earlier police activity near 69th/Dan Ryan. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line trains are running w/residual delays and congestion following earlier police activity near 69th/Dan Ryan.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #35 31st/35th and Eastbound #31 31st Temporary Reroute near 33rd/Rhodes
ShortDescription: 35 31st/35th and EB 31 31st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 33rd/Rhodes.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#35 31st/35th and Eastbound #31 31st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 33rd/Rhodes.

#35 31st/35th buses will operate via 35th, Rhodes, 33rd Pl., Cottage Grove and over normal route. 

Eastbound #31 31st buses will operate via 31st, King Drive, 33rd Pl., Cottage Grove, 35th, King Drive, 31st and over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Chicago/Kilbourne
ShortDescription: EB 66 Chicago buses are temp. rerouted via Chicago, Cicero, Augusta, Kostner, Chicago and over regular route: due to, street blockage near Chicago/Kilbourne.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via Chicago, Cicero, Augusta, Kostner, Chicago and over regular route: due to, street blockage near Chicago/Kilbourne.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
